patches.before_text: "Deliverables" means reports, configured connectors, mappings, dashboards, documentation, and other final items identified in an Order Form, including project-specific tools, frameworks, and know-how developed in the course of performance.
patches.after_text: Upon payment, Vendor assigns Customer 100% of the right, title, and interest in project-specific deliverables. For embedded pre-existing materials, Vendor grants a perpetual license sufficient for Customer to use the deliverables. Customer has 5 days to identify delivery defects, and Vendor updates the embedded-material inventory within 30 days after a release.
patches.ground_span: Upon payment, Vendor assigns Customer 100% of the right, title, and interest in project-specific deliverables. For embedded pre-existing materials, Vendor grants a perpetual license sufficient for Customer to use the deliverables. Customer has 5 days to identify delivery defects, and Vendor updates the embedded-material inventory within 30 days after a release.

plant_position.fallback_text: "Deliverables" means reports, configured connectors, mappings, dashboards, documentation, and other final items identified in an Order Form, including project-specific tools, frameworks, and know-how developed in the course of performance.

patches.before_text: "Security Incident" means any suspected or actual unauthorized access to, acquisition of, use of, loss of, or disclosure of Customer Data.
patches.after_text: "Security Incident" means any suspected or actual unauthorized access to, acquisition of, use of, loss of, or disclosure of Customer Data. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.
patches.ground_span: "Security Incident" means any suspected or actual unauthorized access to, acquisition of, use of, loss of, or disclosure of Customer Data. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.

plant_position.fallback_text: "Security Incident" means any suspected or actual unauthorized access to, acquisition of, use of, loss of, or disclosure of Customer Data.

patches.after_text: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Vendor will provide its then-current standard security summary upon written request no more than once per year.
patches.ground_span: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Vendor will provide its then-current standard security summary upon written request no more than once per year.
patches.expected_redline_text: Upon reasonable notice, Customer or its independent auditor may review Vendor's records, systems, and controls relevant to the services, security, privacy, and compliance no more than once per year, and more frequently after a material incident or reasonable cause.

plant_position.fallback_text: Upon reasonable notice, Customer or its independent auditor may review Vendor's records, systems, and controls relevant to the services, security, privacy, and compliance no more than once per year, and more frequently after a material incident or reasonable cause.

patches.before_text: Unless an Order Form states otherwise, undisputed invoices are due forty-five days after Customer receives the invoice.
patches.after_text: Unless an Order Form states otherwise, undisputed invoices are due forty-five days after Customer receives the invoice. For clarity, undisputed invoices remain payable net 45 after Customer receives the invoice.
patches.ground_span: Unless an Order Form states otherwise, undisputed invoices are due forty-five days after Customer receives the invoice. For clarity, undisputed invoices remain payable net 45 after Customer receives the invoice.

patches.before_text: Each Order Form will have an initial term of no more than one year and will not automatically extend unless Customer signs a renewal order or gives written approval for a renewal period of one year or less.
patches.after_text: Each Order Form has the initial term stated in it and then continues for additional periods of three years each unless either party sends non-continuation notice at least 60 days before the current period ends.
patches.ground_span: Each Order Form has the initial term stated in it and then continues for additional periods of three years each unless either party sends non-continuation notice at least 60 days before the current period ends.
patches.expected_redline_text: Each Order Form will have an initial term of no more than one year and will not automatically extend unless Customer signs a renewal order or gives written approval for a renewal period of one year or less.

plant_position.fallback_text: Each Order Form will have an initial term of no more than one year and will not automatically extend unless Customer signs a renewal order or gives written approval for a renewal period of one year or less.

patches.before_text: This disclaimer does not limit Vendor's confidentiality duties, data handling duties, indemnities, service-level commitments, or remedies expressly stated in this Agreement.
patches.after_text: The disclaimer excludes implied warranties. Vendor's express warranties and service-level commitments remain enforceable. Data-protection, confidentiality, indemnification, and expressly stated remedies are also disclaimed. Customer gives warranty-claim detail within 30 days after discovery, and Vendor responds to a remedy request within 5 days.
patches.ground_span: The disclaimer excludes implied warranties. Vendor's express warranties and service-level commitments remain enforceable. Data-protection, confidentiality, indemnification, and expressly stated remedies are also disclaimed. Customer gives warranty-claim detail within 30 days after discovery, and Vendor responds to a remedy request within 5 days.

patches.after_text: Vendor may amend any legal or commercial term by posting revised terms on its website, effective immediately without Customer approval.
patches.ground_span: Vendor may amend any legal or commercial term by posting revised terms on its website, effective immediately without Customer approval.
patches.expected_redline_text: No amendment, modification, or waiver is effective unless in a writing signed by authorized representatives of both parties.
